Legal

PRIVACY POLICY

Last updated: January 2026

The Short Version

We don't collect your data. We don't track you. We don't use cookies. This website is a simple, static portfolio site — nothing you do here is stored on our end.

Contact Form

The enquiry form on the Contact Us page does not send data to any server or database operated by AshPhotoStudio. It acts purely as a message formatter: when you click "Send on WhatsApp →", your browser constructs a wa.me deep link using the information you typed and opens WhatsApp directly in a new tab — with your message pre-filled. Nothing is transmitted to or stored by us at any point.

Any data you share through WhatsApp is governed by WhatsApp's own Privacy Policy .

Cookies

This website does not use cookies of any kind — no session cookies, no tracking cookies, no analytics cookies. We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any other third-party tracking script.

User Data

We do not collect, store, process, or share any personally identifiable information (PII). There is no user account system, no newsletter, and no mailing list on this website.

Third-Party Content

This site loads fonts from Google Fonts and embeds a Google Maps iframe on the Contact page. These third-party services may set their own cookies or collect usage data in accordance with their respective privacy policies. We do not control these services.

External Links

This site contains links to external websites (Pinterest, WhatsApp, Google Maps). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies independently.

Changes to This Policy

If we ever change this policy, the updated version will be posted here with a revised "Last updated" date. Since we don't collect your contact details, we have no way to notify you directly — so feel free to check back any time.

Questions?

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, reach out to Ash directly at ashpaul102@email.com.
